ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motifs" (
  "motif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motif */,
  "motif_name" TEXT /* Name of the motif */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the motif */,
  "consensus_sequence" TEXT /* Consensus sequence of the motif */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the motif was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the motif was last updated */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxonomic group */,
  "public_domain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the motif is in the public domain */,
  "references" TEXT /* References to scientific literature or databases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motif_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the sequence is located */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sequence data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was last updated */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number from public databases */,
  "is_reference" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sequence is a reference genome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motif_occurrences" (
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motif occurrence */,
  "motif_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motif */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand where the motif occurs (+ or -) */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the motif in the sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the motif in the sequence */,
  "p_value" REAL /* Statistical significance (p-value) */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Adjusted statistical significance (q-value) */,
  "matched_sequence" TEXT /* Exact sequence that matches the motif */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the occurrence was created */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the motif occurrence */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the motif (forward, reverse complement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motif_occurrences_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motif_occurrences_motif_id FOREIGN KEY ("motif_id") REFERENCES motifs ("motif_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence version */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes in each version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metadata was created */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., biological, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department or team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity accessed (e.g., sequence, motif) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., gene, regulatory region) */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the annotation in the sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the annotation in the sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated pipeline) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motif_annotations" (
  "motif_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motif annotation */,
  "motif_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motif */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., regulatory element, binding site) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated pipeline) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motif_annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motif_annotations_motif_id FOREIGN KEY ("motif_id") REFERENCES motifs ("motif_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., FASTA, BED) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format_version" TEXT /* Version of the file format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_files_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)
